overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long CRWV Daily ETF (CRWG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of CoreWeave, Inc. (CRWV) stock, less fees and expenses CRWG was launched on Aug 11, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
